TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Yoweri Museveni == ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 9, Yoweri Museveni, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Uganda ta' misuw hya' ga Yoweri Museveni, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1986 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == joweri mus~…ēe*eni == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, joweri mus~…ēe*eni, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw u…£an*a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a joweri mus~…ēe*eni, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: == Yoweri Museveni == ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 9, Yoweri Museveni, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1944) mrhuw Uganda ta' misuw hya' ga Yoweri Museveni, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 1986 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == joweri mus~…ēe*eni == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, joweri mus~…ēe*eni, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw u…£an*a ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a joweri mus~…ēe*eni, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
